scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const p=require('node:path'); fs.rmSync('../docs',{recursive:true,force:true});" && observable build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const p=require('node:path'); const src=p.resolve('src/data'); const dst=p.resolve('../docs/data'); fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true,force:true});"
